problem.title: Scramble String
problem.description: We can scramble a string s to get a string t using the following algorithm:

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming
solutions.description: Use a 3D DP table where dp[i][j][len] indicates whether s1[i..i+len-1] is a scramble of s2[j..j+len-1]. For each length, split the substring at every possible cut point and check both non-swapped and swapped child pairs, building up from length 1 (single character match) to the full string length.
